content_body: The house was amazing and the perfect size for our 3 families (family of 3, 4 and 2) plus our 2 dogs. Lots of space and things for the 3 boys to do. It was close to shopping and hiking is not too far away. We love to cook, so a nice big kitchen was perfect for us, with a beautiful family table to all sit down and eat at. The view from the living room is out-of-this world. Any issues we ran into, property management was very responsive!
title: Perfect Getaway for Multiple Families!
